titleStmt.title: SII 15.102: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 102. (B.K. No. 199 of 1928-29.) AṆṆĪGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Guḷḷikēri Basavaṇṇa.
This is dated the 6th regnal year of the king, Visha, Pushya-amāvāsyā Wednesday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1162 A.D., January 17.

It records a gift of land to the goddess Chaṇḍikā of the holy place of Aṇṇigeṟe by Mahāpradhāna Śrīdharayya, the Perggaḍe of Beḷvala-nāḍu, at the request of Paṭṭaṇaverggaḍe Kēśirāja. A portion of the gift land was assigned to the learned Brāhmaṇa who would perform the worship. Kēśirāja whose genealogical account is given, belonged to the Vāji-vamśa. Aṇṇigeṟe is described as the rājadhāni of the Beḷvala country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© srīmardgīrvvāṇakōṭīratāḍitāṁghrisarōruhā . babhāti caṁḍikādēvī daitya sēnā vimarddinī .
paranṛpadikpāḷakaraṁ beṁkoṇḍu caṁdrahāsadinādaṁ dhareyoḷpratāpalaṁkēśvara nesedaṁ sainya
bijjanṛpaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapurava rādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavṛ
ṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuriya kuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ kadana pracaṁḍaṁ mānakana
kācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkuśaṁ gajasāmanta śaraṇāgatevajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁ kēśvaraṁ vairībha kaṇṭhī
radaṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ śanivārasiddhi giridurggamallaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ niśśaṁkamallaṁ nāmādisamastapra
śasti sahitaṁ śrīmadbhujabaḷacakravartti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarōtta rābhi
v®ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . v® . [Aṁtu] vidvajjanavakrapaṁkē
ruhaṣaṇḍa lakṣmī samāna vadanaṁ paṁ camaṁ satataṁ māḍiya
kṣitiyoḷsiddhugi daṁḍanāthanesedaṁ śāṁḍilyagōtrō dbe
vaṁ . hara prakāśadoḷu rēṁdrekuṁjaraṁgurbbiyoḷe tanugiri
yoḷdoreyeṁbi virājisutirppudadrijāvarahaṁsa nōjvaḷōrjjita
yaśōlate siddhugidaṁḍanāthanaṁ . va . Ā daṁḍanāthanaṁkakāra lakṣmīvadhugaḷaṁkaraṇamenisi . kaṁ . kṛtapu
ṇyaṁ boppadēva rājanuṁ vibudha jana stutamāya dēvasēnāpatiyuṁ vibhu
barmmaṇayyanuṁ karaṇaṁgaḷu . va . Antu tadīyabāṁdhavaṁ . kaṁ . guṇanidhi samasta vibudha praṇayaṁ caturaṁ
burāśisaṁv®tadhātrīpraṇutaṁ dayāparaṁ paṭṭaṇaverggaḍe kēsirājanudghatējaṁ . va . Antu mattaṁ . v® . manu
mārggaṁ sōmanāthaṁ janakananupamākāṁta mādēviyar janani prōdyadguṇāḷaṁkṛta nijasati sāvitri
śuṁbhaccaritrarmmanōjāta nāgaṇanuṁ nelasasadvājivaṁśōdbhanaṁ neṭṭanebhāradvājagō trōnnatane�
daniḷālōkadoḷkēsirājaṁ . va . Antadalladeyuṁ . vananidhivēṣṭitākhiḷadharāvadhugoppuva nūtnara
tnamaṁḍanatarameṁbinaṁ sogayikuṁ gaḍa beḷvalamalli tāne sajjanavanaramyamapratima saṁpadamaggaḷa
rājadhāni naṭṭane ramaṇīyamaṇnigeṟe sarvvajanōdgha sukhapradāyakaṁ . va . Antu mattaṁ .
v® . gāvuṁḍavarggaṁ kṣitidēvavarggaṁ dēvabrajōdyatpuravarggameṁdiṁtāviḥk®taśrī viḷasatrivarggaṁ bhū
vaṁdyamintanyataṭākamēkaṁ . pusiyadudāravṛtti poṇardaṁjada sāhasavṛtti pāpadatta sagada śauca
vṛtti calamallada susthiravṛtti naijadiṁdeseye guṇāḍhyavargga maniḷātaḷadoḷdiṭadinde kūrttu kīrttisada
nāvanaṇnigeṟeya prathitaprabaḷatrivarggamaṁ . va . Antadalladeyuṁ . © svastiśrīmatkaḷacu
riya kuḷakamaḷa tribhuvanaika vīrabijjaṇadēva varṣada 6 neya viṣa saṁvatsarada puṣya damavāsye
budhavāra vyatipāta sūryyagrahaṇadandu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnāpati beḷvala nāḍape
rggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīdharayyaṁgaḷu samastakaraṇaṁgaḷu dharmmakāryyakkanukūḷarāge paṭṭaṇa
verggaḍe kēsirājana binnapadiṁ dharmmatatpararāgi śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇamaṇnigeṟeya śrīpuṇya
kṣētrada caṁḍikādēviya raṁgabhōganivēdyake Alliya purada teṁkaṇa sthaḷadoḷage śrimauḷēśvara
da poladindaṁ teṁka kaḷakaḷēsvarada poladinda muḷuguṁdada hervvaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva balliya purade stha
ḷadiṁdaṁ baḍaga mattaṁ balliyapuradasthaḷadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mūvattumūṟu gēṇa gaḷeyoḷaḷe
du sarvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭa mattarāṟaṟoḷage balliyapurada nāgarāsipaṁḍitargge paṁcōttarade
mattavondanuḷiye mattaraydaṟoḷege trivarggaṁgaḷu vidvāṁse bāhmaṇanāgi tāṁgida pūjārige ma
ttaroṁdu kammaṁ nālnūrayvattu Intī dharmmamaṁ nāḍadhikārigaḷuṁ karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ trivarggaṁgaḷuṁ sarvvabā
dhāparihāramāgi pratipāḷisuvaru . Intidharmmamanārorvvarppatipāḷisida(pratipāḷisidava)
rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayogeyeṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷalli caturvvēda pāragarappa sahasrabrā
hmaṇargge sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷaguma ponnoḷkaṭṭisiyamāvāsyayodivāra sūryyagra
haṇa byatīpāta saṁkramaṇameṁba mahātithigaḷoḷdānaṁ geyda viśiṣṭa puṇyaphaḷamakkumida nāvanō
rvvanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrādi tīrthaṁgaḷoḷcaturvvēdapāragarappa sahasra brāhma ṇarumaṁ
sahasra kavileyumaṁ puṇyatithigaḷoḷkhaḍgapāṇiyogi svehastediṁ hatiyisida mahā pātakana
kku . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasyaca tatphaḷaṁ .
caṁḍikādēviya kammanālnūrayvattu .
Digital edition of SII 15.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
